title: 'I do not need a babysitter': Row as Swinney admits he cannot ban US jets from Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: 'I do not need a babysitter': Row as Swinney admits he cannot ban US jets from Prestwick Airport. A row has broken out after the UK government cancelled John Swinney's national security briefing because the Scottish Secretary was not...
